title: MieHex
description: An addon fo HexCasting,add some useful patterns and iotas.
body:
MieHex - Hex Casting Addon
MieHex is an addon for Hex Casting that introduces new Iota types and patterns for mishap handling, enchantment manipulation, custom entity summoning, and advanced meta-evaluation.

Key features:

Mishap Capturing & Throwing: Wrap hexes with Hephaestus's Gambit to catch mishaps as storable Iotas; Apollo's Gambit throws any iota as a mishap.

Enchantment Iotas: Extract enchantments or enchant items via hexes, with the ability to combine identical enchantments.（in 1.21.1 version only）

Idea Entities: Define creature attributes and summon living entities with custom stats.

Type & Mishap Inspection: Reveal the type of any iota and inspect the parameters of captured mishaps.

All features are configurable via datapacks or KubeJS, making it modpack-friendly.
